# Claude Chat MCP

> Free, open-source MCP connectors that let Claude Desktop work with the self-hosted and on-prem tools a company runs, like Confluence, Jira, Bitbucket, Airtable, and SQL databases. Each connector is a small local program; nothing runs in the cloud.

The website at https://claudechatmcp.com is a searchable catalog of the available connectors, in English and Vietnamese. The catalog data lives at https://claudechatmcp.com/registry.json.

## Connectors
- Confluence: search and read pages in a self-hosted Confluence (Server / Data Center).
- Jira: search and read issues with JQL in a self-hosted Jira.
- Bitbucket: browse repositories, pull requests, and commits on Bitbucket Server.
- Airtable: read and update Airtable bases, tables, and records.
- MySQL, MariaDB, ClickHouse, Oracle: read-only SQL access to each database.

## Links
- Catalog: https://claudechatmcp.com/
- Source code: https://github.com/huylq98/claude-chat-mcp
- Connector registry (JSON): https://claudechatmcp.com/registry.json
